subcodes.first_line: And thereafter He made utterances that culminated in reference to the men of the House of Justice, which is at this time represented in the wisdom of the Spiritual Assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و بعد بیاناتی فرمودند که منتهی شد به رجال بیت العدل که حال حکمة محفل روحانی
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @consultation, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
